onboarding_1_des: Our unique authenticity protocol ensures every item is verified via live video recording.
onboarding_2_des: Say goodbye to subscriptions. Pay only for what you need with our seamless credit system.
onboarding_3_des: Hire certified specialists to inspect vehicles and electronics before you buy.
onboarding_4_des: A trusted community of verified buyers and sellers for a worry-free experience.

selectImageYourItem: Please select better quality image that represent your ad
atLeastOneImageRequired: At least one gallery image required
selectUpTOOneImage: Please select up to one image so that user will able to observe better

countryRequired: Country is required. Please add a country

savedPreferencesAndMessagesLost: Saved preferences and messages will be lost.

youBlockedThisContact: You blocked this contact. Tap to unblock.

tooManyRequests: Unusual activity detected. Please try again later
sessionExpired: The otp code has expired. Please re-send the verification code to try again
wrongPassword: The password is invalid or the user does not have a password.
userDisabled: The user account has been disabled by an administrator.
operationNotAllowed: This operation is not allowed. Please contact support.
unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
noAdsAvailableInThisLocation: Sorry, there are currently no ads available in this location. Try selecting a different location.

youHaveEnteredInvalidUserNameOrPassword: You have entered an invalid username or password
deleteAdsDescription: Are you sure you want to delete advertisements?
pleaseFillDefaultLangRequiredMsg: Please fill in all required details in the default language before adding translations or continuing.
allRequiredDefaultLangFilled: All required fields in the default language are filled - you can add translations or continue to list your ad
expiredItemsMultiRenewNote: Long-press expired items to renew or delete several items together.
selectAccountTypeDescription: Please select the type of account you want to create to get started with NOFAK.
individualDescription: Register as an individual to buy and sell items with simplicity. Get {credits} bonus points.
dealerDescription: For businesses and professionals. Get {credits} bonus points and advanced verification.
tutorialLocationDescription: Change your location to discover verified items and ads near you.
tutorialChatDescription: Chat directly with buyers and sellers in real time to negotiate and finalize deals.
tutorialSellDescription: Post an ad to sell your items. Follow the Authenticity Protocol with a live camera recording to get verified!
tutorialProfileDescription: Manage your account, view your credit transactions, and customize settings.
nofakOnboardingSubtitle: The premium marketplace for verified items. Experience authenticity with our 100% Live Camera Policy.
openItemFully: Open the item fully and show all sides
presentProofOfOwnership: Present proof of ownership such as the bill or box
demonstrateWorkingCondition: Demonstrate that the item is in working condition
stateAskingPriceOnCamera: State your asking price clearly on camera
recordingInstructionTitle: Simple guide for high-quality item verification
recordingInstructionTip: Tip: Recording in bright, natural light helps your item get verified faster.
instr_cars: Show full exterior walkaround, open hood with engine running, and interior with odometer reading. Capture all 4 tires, any damage, and trunk space clearly.
instr_vehicles: Record a complete 360-degree exterior view of the vehicle. Show engine bay, interior cabin, dashboard gauges, and any visible wear or modifications.
instr_vehicle_inspectors: Film the inspection setup and tools. Show the vehicle being inspected, highlight key checkpoints, and present any diagnostic reports or findings on camera.
instr_used_cars: Walk around the car showing paint condition and body panels. Start the engine, show odometer, rev it, open trunk and hood. Zoom into any scratches, dents, or rust.
instr_autos: Do a full walkaround showing all body panels and lights. Start the engine, show dashboard with mileage, demonstrate gear shifting, and capture tire tread condition.
instr_trucks: Show the full exterior cabin and trailer/bed. Start the engine, show instrument cluster, interior condition, tire tread, and any hydraulic components in action.
instr_buses: Record exterior walkaround, passenger seating area, driver's dashboard, and engine compartment. Show all doors functioning and check tire condition.
instr_heavy_equipment: Demonstrate the machine's primary functions (lifts, buckets, etc.). Show the engine running, hydraulic lines, tracks/tires, and hour meter.
instr_tractors: Show the tractor from all sides, engine compartment, rear PTO and hitch. Demonstrate it starting and show the hour meter and tire condition.
instr_boats: Show the hull condition, deck area, and cabin interior. Start the engine/outboard and demonstrate steering and electronics. Capture the trailer if included.
instr_yachts: Record a tour of the deck, helm station, and all interior cabins/galley. Demonstrate engine start and navigation systems. Show the hull and waterlines.
instr_spare_parts: Show the part from multiple angles. Capture any brand markings, part numbers, and show the condition of connectors, threads, or mounting points.
instr_wheels: Show all wheels included in the set. Capture the front face, rim edges for curb rash, and the mounting holes. Show any brand logos clearly.
instr_tyres: Show the tread depth of all tires using a gauge or coin. Capture the sidewalls for DOT codes (age) and check for any cracks, plugs, or bulges.
instr_car_audio: Power on the unit and show the display. Demonstrate sound output through speakers if possible, and show the rear connectors and wiring harness.
instr_gps: Power on the device and show it acquiring a satellite signal. Demonstrate the touchscreen responsiveness and show the mounting hardware and cables.
instr_bikes: Start the bike cold and show the engine sound. Do a full 360 turnaround, capture chain tension, tire treads, brake pads, and show odometer reading clearly.
instr_motorcycles: Record both sides of the motorcycle, start the engine, and rev gently. Show exhaust condition, handlebar controls, speedometer, and any aftermarket modifications.
instr_scooters: Start the scooter and show it idling smoothly. Record all body panels, under-seat storage, tire condition, brake levers, and the instrument cluster.
instr_used_bikes: Show overall body condition from all angles. Start the engine cold, display odometer, demonstrate both brakes, and zoom into chain, sprockets, and tire wear.
instr_motorbikes: Film a complete walkaround with both side profiles. Start engine, show exhaust smoke check, capture dashboard readings, and highlight any scratches or dents.
instr_mobiles: Show front screen powered on, back panel, and both side frames. Capture top, bottom, camera lenses, and settings page with model and storage info.
instr_phones: Display the phone running with screen on. Show all four edges, camera module, charging port, and navigate to Settings > About to show model and storage.
instr_smartphones: Power on and show home screen responsiveness. Capture front and rear cameras, all physical buttons, SIM tray, and display the About Phone page with IMEI visible.
instr_smart_phones: Record the phone from all angles with screen lit. Show touch response, camera quality by taking a quick snap, speaker test, and Settings page with device info.
instr_used_phones: Show overall body condition including screen scratches. Power on, demonstrate touch accuracy, open camera app, show battery health, and Settings > About page.
instr_tablets: Power on and show the screen brightness and touch response. Record the back panel, all corners, charging port, and the Settings page showing specifications.
instr_ipads: Show the iPad screen on and responsive. Record the back (showing model/serial), camera, and all edges. Show Settings > General > About for specs.
instr_mobile_accessories: Show the accessory from all sides. If it's a charger or power bank, show it charging a device. Capture the original packaging if available.
instr_smart_watches: Power on and show the watch face. Demonstrate touch navigation, heart rate sensor, strap mechanism, charging pins, and display the About/Settings page.
instr_laptops: Power it on and show screen, keyboard, and all ports on both sides. Display system info with specs, battery health, and any damage.
instr_computers: Power on and show the full boot sequence. Record all ports, drive bays, and open System Information to display CPU, RAM, and storage details.
instr_macbook: Open the lid showing the Retina display. Record the keyboard, trackpad, and all USB-C ports. Show Apple Menu > About This Mac for specs and battery cycle count.
instr_electronics_technicians: Film your workbench setup and repair tools. Demonstrate a repair or diagnostic in progress, and show any certifications or credentials on camera.
instr_pc: Show the full tower or case from all sides. Open the side panel to display internal components. Power on and show BIOS or System Info with specs.
instr_desktops: Record the PC tower, monitor, and peripherals. Power it on and show the desktop screen. Open device manager to show CPU, GPU, and RAM specs.
instr_monitors: Connect and power on the monitor showing a test pattern. Record bezels, stand adjustment, all input ports, and display the OSD menu with resolution settings.
instr_printers: Show the printer powered on. Print a test page to demonstrate ink/toner quality and paper feed. Capture the scanner bed and all connection ports.
instr_scanners: Power on the scanner and perform a preview scan. Show the glass surface for scratches and capture the interface cable and power adapter.
instr_hard_disks: Show the drive's physical condition and connectors. If possible, show it connected to a PC with the disk management or health utility screen visible.
instr_networking: Show the router, switch, or modem powered on with status lights. Capture the model label on the bottom and all LAN/WAN ports.
instr_software: Show the original packaging, disc, or license card. If it's a digital key, show the official source or proof of purchase while hiding the actual key.
instr_graphics_cards: Show the GPU from all sides, focusing on the fans and heat sink. Capture the PCIe connector and video output ports. Show it running in a PC if possible.
instr_motherboards: Record the motherboard layout, CPU socket (check pins), and all RAM/PCIe slots. Show the rear I/O panel and any included accessories.
instr_processors: Show the top of the CPU with model markings clearly visible. Capture the underside (pins or pads) to show they are clean and undamaged.
instr_ram: Show the stickers on the RAM sticks for capacity and speed specs. Capture the gold contacts on both sides to show they are clean.
instr_gaming_pc: Show the case with RGB lighting on. Capture internal components through the window. Power on and show a benchmark or game running to demonstrate performance.
instr_consoles: Power on the console and show the main menu on a TV. Record the console unit, all ports, and the controller(s) condition.
instr_playstation: Show the PS console and controller. Power it on to the dashboard, demonstrate a disc loading or game starting, and show the storage settings.
instr_xbox: Record the Xbox console and controller. Power it on to the Home screen, show the ports, and navigate to storage settings to show available space.
instr_nintendo: Show the Switch or handheld console. Power it on, demonstrate the joy-cons/controls, and show the screen condition and game slot.
instr_vr_headsets: Show the VR headset, lenses (check for scratches), and controllers. Power it on and show the internal display view if possible.
instr_tv_video_audio: Power on and play a video to show display quality and sound. Show back panel, all ports, remote, and any screen scratches.
instr_televisions: Turn on the TV and display a test image for color accuracy. Show all HDMI and USB ports, the remote control, and any dead pixels or screen damage.
instr_smart_tv: Power on, navigate the smart menu to show the OS version. Play a video for display and speaker test. Show all ports, remote pairing, and the back panel.
instr_monitor: Connect and power on the monitor showing a test pattern. Record bezels, stand adjustment, all input ports, and display the OSD menu with resolution settings.
instr_speakers: Play music at various volumes to demonstrate clear sound without distortion. Show all drivers, speaker terminals, and the overall cabinet condition.
instr_headphones: Show the headband, ear cups, and cushions. If wireless, show it pairing to a phone. Demonstrate sound quality and show the charging/audio cable.
instr_earbuds: Show both earbuds and the charging case. Demonstrate them charging and pairing. Capture the different ear tip sizes if included.
instr_home_theatre: Show the receiver and all speakers/subwoofer. Power on and play a surround sound test. Capture the remote and all wiring.
instr_microphones: Connect the mic and record a short audio clip or show levels on a mixer. Capture the grille condition and any included stands or pop filters.
instr_cameras_lenses: Power on and show lens mount, viewfinder, and LCD screen working. Capture shutter actuation, all buttons, battery compartment, and any lens scratches.
instr_cameras: Power on and show lens, screen, and all buttons working. Show sensor, battery compartment, memory card slot, and shutter count if possible.
instr_photography: Display your photography equipment from all angles. Power on cameras, demonstrate lens switching, show sensor cleaning status, and present accessories.
instr_camcorders: Power on and record a short clip to demonstrate video quality. Show the flip screen, zoom function, battery, media slot, and all ports.
instr_projectors: Power on the projector and show an image on a wall/screen. Demonstrate focus and zoom controls, and show the lamp hours in the menu if possible.
instr_refrigerators: Open all doors and show interior shelves, drawers, and freezer compartment. Turn it on, show the compressor running, and capture the brand label.
instr_fridge: Show the exterior finish and handle condition. Open doors, display all compartments, check the light and thermostat, and show the model sticker.
instr_washing_machine: Show the exterior drum opening and detergent dispenser. Run a quick cycle to demonstrate spinning, and capture the control panel and model label.
instr_washing_machines: Open the lid or door and show the drum interior. Demonstrate a wash cycle starting, capture the control panel settings, and show the brand label.
instr_ac: Show the indoor and outdoor units. Turn it on and demonstrate cooling, capture the remote control, filter condition, and the model/capacity label.
instr_air_conditioners: Record the AC unit in operation. Show the temperature display on the remote/unit, check the air flow, and capture the specifications plate.
instr_ac_appliances_specialists: Film your AC service setup. Demonstrate gas charging or cleaning process, show diagnostic tools, and present your service credentials.
instr_home_appliances: Turn it on and show it running, then capture all exterior sides. Show inside compartments, brand/model label, and any dents or rust.
instr_appliances: Power on the appliance and demonstrate its primary function. Show all sides, the power cord, control panel, and the manufacturer label.
instr_microwave_ovens: Show the interior and the turntable rotating. Power it on for a few seconds to show the display and lights, and capture the door seal condition.
instr_ovens: Show the interior racks and heating elements. Power it on to show the display/lights, and capture the exterior glass and handle condition.
instr_dishwashers: Open the door and show the racks and spray arms. Demonstrate a cycle starting and show the control panel and door seal.
instr_vacuum_cleaners: Turn it on and demonstrate suction. Show all included attachments, the dust bag/bin area, and the power cord retraction.
instr_water_purifiers: Show the purifier installed or on a counter. Demonstrate water dispensing, check for leaks, and show the filter status indicators.
instr_water_heaters: Show the heater unit and pipe connections. Power it on and show the indicator lights. Capture the capacity and brand label.
instr_fans: Turn the fan on at all speed settings. Demonstrate the oscillation function and show the blades, guard, and base condition.
instr_air_coolers: Show the cooler unit, water tank, and cooling pads. Turn it on to demonstrate the fan and pump, and show the control knobs.
instr_mixers: Show the mixer base and all included jars. Turn it on to show the motor running at different speeds, and check the jar lids and blades.
instr_grinders: Record the grinder in operation. Show the grinding stones/blades, the motor base, and all accessories. Capture the brand label.
instr_juicers: Show the juicer assembled and all parts. Turn it on to demonstrate the motor, and show the pulp container and juice outlet.
instr_coffee_makers: Power on the machine and show it brewing or heating water. Capture the water reservoir, filter basket, and carafe condition.
instr_kettles: Fill with water and power on to show it heating and the auto-shutoff working. Show the interior for scale buildup and the base/cord.
instr_iron: Power on the iron and show the indicator light. Demonstrate the steam function if applicable, and show the soleplate for any burns or scratches.
instr_furniture: Record all 4 sides of the item and close-up of any scratches or stains. Show joints, legs, and inside compartments for stability and space.
instr_sofas: Record the sofa from all angles. Show the fabric/leather condition, sit on it to demonstrate cushion firmness, and check the legs and frame.
instr_beds: Show the bed frame, headboard, and slats/base. Demonstrate stability by shaking it slightly. Capture any wear on the frame or upholstery.
instr_mattresses: Show both sides of the mattress. Capture the fabric condition (no stains), check for sagging, and show the brand/size label.
instr_tables: Record the tabletop for scratches or heat marks. Show the legs and underside for stability. Demonstrate any extension mechanisms.
instr_chairs: Show the chair from all sides. Check for wobbles, inspect the seat upholstery or material, and show the legs and backrest condition.
instr_cupboards: Open all doors and drawers to show interior space and shelving. Check hinges and drawer slides. Show the exterior finish on all sides.
instr_wardrobes: Record the wardrobe with doors open. Show hanging rods, shelves, and drawers. Inspect the exterior panels and handles for any damage.
instr_dining_tables: Show the full dining set including chairs. Inspect the table surface and demonstrate any leaf extensions. Check all chair joints for stability.
instr_dining_sets: Record the table and all chairs together. Show the surface condition of each piece and check for any wobbles or loose joints.
instr_bookshelves: Show the full height of the bookshelf. Inspect each shelf for bowing or damage. Record the back panel and side supports.
instr_office_furniture: Record the full piece including drawers, shelves, and adjustable parts. Show caster wheels, fabric condition, and height adjustment.
instr_office_chairs: Demonstrate the height adjustment and tilt/swivel functions. Inspect the upholstery, armrests, and caster wheels for smooth movement.
instr_office_desks: Show the desktop surface and any cable management features. Open all drawers to show smooth operation and interior space.
instr_home_decor: Show the decor piece from multiple angles with good lighting. Capture material texture, color accuracy, and any packaging or labels.
instr_rugs: Show the full rug laid out. Capture the pile texture, check for any stains or frayed edges, and show the underside/backing.
instr_carpets: Record the carpet from one end to the other. Zoom into the texture and show any worn areas or stains. Capture the backing if possible.
instr_lamps: Power on the lamp to show it working. Capture the lampshade condition, base material, and the power cord/switch.
instr_paintings: Show the painting in good light. Capture the brushwork/texture, the artist's signature, and the frame condition. Show the back of the canvas.
instr_curtains: Show the curtains hanging or spread out. Capture the fabric pattern, check for any fading or tears, and show the header/hooks area.
instr_mirrors: Record the mirror surface to show it is clear and without cracks. Capture the frame detail and the mounting hardware on the back.
instr_vases: Show the vase from all sides. Check for any chips or cracks, and capture the material finish and any brand markings on the bottom.
instr_clocks: Show the clock face and hands moving. If it's digital, show the display. Capture the casing and any battery/power compartments.
instr_clothing: Show the garment on a hanger or flat surface. Capture the front, back, fabric texture, brand tags, and size labels clearly.
instr_men_fashion: Record the item from front and back. Show the fabric quality, stitching details, brand labels, and any unique features or flaws.
instr_women_fashion: Show the outfit from multiple angles. Capture the fabric drape, any embellishments, brand tags, and the interior lining or labels.
instr_kids_fashion: Record the clothing item showing front and back. Check for any stains or wear, and show the size tag and brand label.
instr_dresses: Show the full length of the dress. Capture the fabric pattern, neckline, sleeves, and hem. Show any zippers or buttons functioning.
instr_shirts: Record the shirt showing the collar, cuffs, and button line. Capture the fabric texture and show the brand and size tags.
instr_pants: Show the pants from waist to hem. Capture the pocket details, zipper/button closure, and fabric condition. Show the size and brand labels.
instr_jeans: Record the jeans showing the wash/color. Capture the pocket stitching, leather brand patch, and hem condition. Show the size tag.
instr_jackets: Show the jacket from front and back. Demonstrate the main zipper, check the pocket linings, and show the fabric or leather texture.
instr_sweaters: Record the sweater showing the knit pattern. Check for any pilling or snags, and show the cuffs, neckline, and brand/size tags.
instr_suits: Show the jacket and trousers together. Inspect the lapels, pockets, and lining. Record the fabric quality and show all brand/size labels.
instr_sarees: Unfold part of the saree to show the pallu and border design. Capture the fabric texture and color accuracy in natural light.
instr_shoes: Show both shoes from all sides, including the soles to show wear. Capture the insoles, heels, and any original box or branding.
instr_sneakers: Record the sneakers from all angles. Show the outsoles for tread wear, the insoles, laces, and any brand logos or limited edition markings.
instr_boots: Show the boots from front, side, and back. Capture the leather/material texture, sole condition, and any zippers or laces.
instr_heels: Record the heels showing the height and style. Inspect the heel tips and soles for wear, and show the interior branding and material.
instr_sandals: Show the sandals from all angles. Capture the footbed condition, straps/buckles, and the sole wear. Show any brand markings.
instr_watches: Show front dial working, back case, and strap close-up. Capture side crown, any scratches, and brand/model engraving.
instr_luxury_watches: Record a detailed close-up of the dial, movement (if visible), and serial numbers. Show the original box, papers, and warranty card.
instr_jewellery: Show the item under good light to capture sparkle and detail. Show any hallmarks or brand stamps, and the clasp or closure.
instr_necklaces: Record the full length of the necklace. Capture the pendant detail, the chain links, and the clasp functioning. Show any hallmarks.
instr_rings: Show the ring from all sides. Capture the center stone or design detail, and show the inside of the band for any hallmarks or size stamps.
instr_earrings: Show both earrings together. Capture the front design and the back/posts. Show any brand markings or metal hallmarks.
instr_bracelets: Record the bracelet laid out and on a wrist if possible. Show the link or cuff detail and demonstrate the clasp working.
instr_handbags: Show the bag's exterior, corners (check for scuffs), and interior lining. Demonstrate all zippers and show any brand tags or serial numbers.
instr_backpacks: Record the backpack showing all compartments. Demonstrate the zippers, check the shoulder straps and padding, and show the interior space.
instr_wallets: Show the wallet's exterior and all interior card slots and compartments. Capture the material texture and any brand logos.
instr_sunglasses: Show the frames and lenses from multiple angles. Check for scratches on the lenses and show the brand markings on the arms.
instr_luggage: Show the suitcase from all sides. Demonstrate the wheels, telescoping handle, and zippers. Record the interior compartments and locks.
instr_bicycles: Do a full turnaround and show both wheels, brakes, and gears. Capture seat, handlebar, chain, and any rust or damage.
instr_cycles: Record both sides of the cycle. Spin each wheel to show true alignment, squeeze brakes, shift gears, and zoom into the chain.
instr_kids_cycles: Show the overall frame size and training wheel condition. Demonstrate pedal and brake function, and capture any paint chips or rust.
instr_gym_equipment: Demonstrate the equipment's movement or function. Check for any rust, fraying cables, or worn padding. Show any weight stacks or labels.
instr_treadmills: Power on the treadmill and show the belt moving at different speeds. Demonstrate the incline and show the console display and safety key.
instr_dumbbells: Show the full set of dumbbells or the pair. Capture the weight markings on each, and check the grips and overall finish.
instr_yoga_mats: Unroll the mat to show its full length and thickness. Capture the surface texture and check for any tears or signs of heavy use.
instr_cricket_bats: Show the bat's face, edges, and back. Capture the grain pattern, check for any cracks or repairs, and show the grip and brand stickers.
instr_football: Show the ball from all sides. Demonstrate that it is fully inflated and check the stitching and valve. Capture any brand logos.
instr_badminton_rackets: Show the racket head and strings (check tension). Capture the shaft and grip condition, and show any brand markings.
instr_tennis_rackets: Record the racket showing the frame and string bed. Check for any cracks in the frame and show the grip and brand name.
instr_fitness: Show the fitness accessory or equipment in use if possible. Capture its physical condition, brand, and any digital displays.
instr_sports_gear: Record the sports item from all angles. Capture the material quality, brand logos, and any signs of use or damage.
instr_gaming_consoles: Power on the console and show it connected to a TV. Demonstrate a game loading and show the console and controllers.
instr_musical_instruments: Play a few notes to demonstrate the sound. Show the instrument's physical condition, brand name, and any included cases or accessories.
instr_guitars: Show the guitar body, neck, and headstock. Capture the strings, bridge, and tuning pegs. Play a few chords to show it stays in tune.
instr_pianos: Show the full keyboard and cabinet. Play several keys across the range to show they all work and sound correct. Capture the pedals.
instr_drums: Record the full drum kit or individual drum. Show the drum heads, shells, and hardware. Demonstrate the sound of each piece.
instr_keyboards_piano: Power on the keyboard and demonstrate several sounds/voices. Show all keys, the display, and all connection ports on the back.
instr_toys: Show the toy from all sides. If it has moving parts or electronics, demonstrate them working. Capture the original packaging if available.
instr_dolls: Record the doll showing its face, hair, and outfit. Check for any marks or damage, and show any accessories or original box.
instr_action_figures: Show the figure's articulation and paint detail. Capture any included weapons or accessories, and show the original packaging.
instr_puzzles: Show the puzzle box and the pieces inside. If it's completed, show the full image. Capture any missing piece information.
instr_board_games: Open the box and show all the components (board, pieces, cards, manual). Capture the condition of the box and the game parts.
instr_books: Show the front and back covers and the spine. Flip through the pages to show they are clean and without markings or tears.
instr_magazines: Show the magazine cover and overall condition. Flip through a few pages to show the content and check for any cutouts or damage.
instr_comics: Record the comic book in its bag/board or flat. Show the cover, spine, and several interior pages to demonstrate grade/condition.
instr_apartments: Take a video tour of all rooms, including the kitchen and bathrooms. Show the view from windows/balcony and any building amenities.
instr_houses: Record a walkthrough of the entire house, including the exterior/yard. Show all rooms, the roof condition, and any garage or outbuildings.
instr_villas: Take a tour of the villa interior and the private garden or pool area. Show all bedrooms, the kitchen, and the exterior facade.
instr_plots: Record the plot of land from all corners to show its boundaries. Show the access road, surrounding neighborhood, and any utility connections.
instr_land: Film the land from multiple vantage points. Show the terrain, any existing structures or trees, and the surrounding area and access points.
instr_shops: Show the shop's interior space, storefront/display window, and the surrounding street or mall area. Capture any storage or utility areas.
instr_office_space: Take a tour of the office layout, including work areas, meeting rooms, and pantry/toilets. Show the building entrance and lobby.
instr_warehouses: Record the full interior height and floor space. Show the loading docks, office area, and the exterior access and security features.
instr_it_services: Demonstrate your software or service on a screen. Show your portfolio, team, or workspace, and present any professional certifications.
instr_construction: Film your ongoing or completed projects. Show your equipment, team at work, and highlight specific skills or quality of finish.
instr_cleaning_services: Demonstrate your cleaning process or show before-and-after results. Show your professional cleaning equipment and supplies.
instr_teaching: Show your classroom or teaching materials. Record a short clip of a lesson or explanation to demonstrate your teaching style.
instr_car_rental: Show the cars available in your fleet. Record the exterior and interior of a sample car, and show your rental office or location.
instr_wedding_services: Show your portfolio of wedding photography, decor, or planning. Film your studio or sample setups and any testimonials.
technicianIntroVideoWarning: To list a service as a Technician, you must first record a Self-Introduction video in your professional profile.
